level_signals: 2-3 years of experience at a high-growth technology company
Operational execution role, no people management mentioned
Described as 'operational backbone' without leadership scope

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 2-3 years of experience at a high-growth technology company in product operations, revenue operations, legal operations, deal desk, solutions engineering, or investment banking
Exceptional attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple competing priorities simultaneously without losing quality
Strong written communication skills - you can translate complex, technical information into clear and accurate language quickly
Proven ability to sustain high output and high quality simultaneously - you don't cut corners when the workload spikes
A track record of improving the processes you inherit, not just running them
Genuine enthusiasm for applying AI and automation tools to make repetitive work faster and better

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Exposure to enterprise security or compliance questionnaires (SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, etc.)
Experience in a sales-adjacent or customer trust function

scope.surface: RFP response function — end-to-end ownership of RFP triage, coordination, content infrastructure, and automation
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise SaaS (AI customer experience platform)
primary_metrics_inferred: Reduction in manual work via automation
core_responsibilities: Own Sierra's RFP response: Triage incoming RFP requests, coordinate with internal stakeholders, and deliver accurate, polished responses back to sales on time

Drive cross-functional coordination: Partner with subject-matter experts (SMEs) in Security, Legal, and Product to get the right answers fast, managing competing stakeholder priorities without losing momentum or quality
Own the content infrastructure: Maintain and continuously improve Sierra's RFP knowledge base, identifying gaps, working with SMEs to close them, and raising the quality bar on every response
Build toward automation: Implement and iterate on AI tooling and workflow automation to reduce manual work and increase consistency across the response process

Support Sales in high-stakes evaluations: Help AEs navigate complex RFP requirements, flag patterns and themes in prospect questions that inform how Sales positions Sierra, and ensure every response puts Sierra's best foot forward

compensation.equity_form: Eligible full-time employees can participate in Sierra's equity plans subject to the terms of the applicable plans and policies

green_flags: Clear, specific scope of ownership — RFP function is well-defined
AI-forward role with explicit automation mandate
High-profile co-founders (Bret Taylor, Clay Bavor) signal credibility and growth
Encourages applications even if experience doesn't precisely match
Equity participation mentioned for full-time employees
Enterprise AI company in growth phase — relevant market exposure
red_flags: Primarily in-person in San Francisco — eliminates remote candidates
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed
Role title 'Analyst' may underrepresent scope or limit leveling ceiling
No mention of team structure or reporting line, making growth path unclear
